Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}Some people think that visiting shrines is boring, but I'm really looking forward to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}I'm gonna go to romance shrines and pray a lot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}When I went to the romance shrine, there were loads and loads of girls just praying desperately![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}I asked what all the fuss was about, and it turns out that they were all fans of Sanada-senpai![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}Normally, they'd get angry if one of them made a move like that, but if they were all there together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}A local guy talked to me today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}I wonder if my prayers at the romance shrine are starting to have an effect![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 609}Maybe I'll score a boyfriend by Christmas this year![n]{f 1 1}
